title: diffuse-cpp: High-Performance CPU Inference Engine for Diffusion Language Models
description: First C++ inference engine for diffusion language models, built on GGML. Achieves 15-28 tok/s on real prompts with Q4_K_M quantization, entropy-based adaptive scheduling, and inter-step KV cache on a 12-core CPU — up to 3.2x faster than llama.cpp on equivalent hardware. 6 of 8 real prompts outperform llama.cpp. Inter-step cache provides 1.6x average speedup with no quality degradation.
notes: Companion software for the paper 'Diffusion Language Models are Faster than Autoregressive on CPU' (DOI: 10.5281/zenodo.19119814)
